24: Deliver the freshly cut nopales to Nikawtenhe.
Deliver the freshly cut nopales and tuna to Nikawtenhe.

25: Deliver the freshly cut nopales to Tsanaya.
Deliver the freshly cut nopales and tuna to Tsanaya.

58: For me? From the sabotender farmer? His timing is impeccable as always.
For me? From the nopales farmer? His timing is impeccable as always.

62: You'll not want for water on your travels with sabotender in your satchel.
You'll not want for water on your travels with nopales in your satchel.

64: And what did you think, seeing their elation for a delivery of fresh sabotender? Pique your interest? Or maybe even worked up your appetite?
And what did you think, seeing their elation for a delivery of fresh nopales? Pique your interest? Or maybe even worked up your appetite?

65: You'll rarely find it eaten anywhere outside of the wilds, but someday, I hope to share the joys of sabotender cuisine with all of Tural─no, the world!
You'll rarely find it eaten anywhere outside of the wilds, but someday, I hope to share the joys of nopales cuisine with all of Tural─no, the world!

67: The next time your stomach growls with hunger, I hope you'll consider answering with fresh sabotender.
The next time your stomach growls with hunger, I hope you'll consider answering with fresh nopales.
